meaning: 塔林[爱沙尼亚共和国首都]
examples: Then a train to Tallinn. By that time, the conference will be over.
DRIVING from Warsaw to Tallinn takes about 13 hours, so we start at 0530.
EVEN allowing for snow, the medieval Old Town of Tallinn is unnaturally quiet.
Karin herself voyaged farther, to Estonia, reviving old family connections and shipping food to Tallinn.
Tallinn is the centre of NATO's cyber-warfare research, and Estonians invented another icon of internet cool: Skype.
